organization.name: Stripe
keywords: computer systems design and related services
organization.raw_address: 354 Oyster Point Blvd, South San Francisco, California 94080, US
organization.short_description:
Stripe, Inc. is a financial infrastructure platform founded in 2010 by brothers John and Patrick Collison. Headquartered in San Francisco, California, with additional offices in Dublin, London, Paris, Singapore, and Tokyo, Stripe specializes in online payment processing and related services for businesses globally. The company simplifies online transactions through developer-friendly APIs, making it easier for businesses to integrate payment solutions.

Stripe's core offerings include payment processing, fraud detection with Stripe Radar, business formation through Stripe Atlas, and merchant cash advances via Stripe Capital. The platform also automates sales tax calculations with Stripe Tax and provides no-code checkout options through Payment Links. Stripe has expanded its services to support various markets and has made significant strides in areas like Bitcoin support and carbon removal initiatives with Stripe Climate. The company has gained a strong reputation among developers and businesses of all sizes, contributing to its substantial growth and high valuation.
